nodes.name: AIOps Roadmap
nodes.description: For Experienced Engineers (with Background in CS/DS/AI/IT)

nodes.name: ConstellationAI Multi Agentic RAG
nodes.description: Production-ready multi-agent RAG system with LangGraph orchestration, real-time token optimization, GPU monitoring, semantic caching, and comprehensive performance analytics. Built for scale.

nodes.name: Real Time Medical Image Enhancement System
nodes.description: State-of-the-art medical image enhancement system using Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM) with 3D U-Net architecture that achieves 35% SNR improvement and processes 512³ volumetric CT/MRI scans in under 2 seconds with 92% radiologist approval.

nodes.name: Real Time Recommendation Engine
nodes.description: Real-Time Recommendation Engine with sub-100ms latency using PySpark, Delta Lake, MLflow & Kafka. Achieves NDCG@10: 0.78, MAP@10: 0.73, Hit Rate@20: 0.91 through advanced matrix factorization (SVD/NMF).

nodes.name: Transformer based Trajectory Forecasting system
nodes.description: Transformer + Diffusion (DDPM) architecture for multi-agent pedestrian trajectory forecasting with temporal self-attention, social cross-attention, and DDIM sampling - evaluated on ETH/UCY benchmark with ablation study

nodes.name: Vehicle Durability Forecasting and Predictive Maintanence System
nodes.description: ML-powered predictive maintenance system achieving $122.9M+ cost savings through vehicle durability forecasting (MAPE: 2.8%), customer complaint analysis (F1: 0.91), and survival modeling (C-index: 0.78) with automated SQL pipelines and Power BI reporting.

nodes.name: Blog Generator
nodes.description: Used LLama 3.1 70B and Orchestrated the entire end to end work flow on AWS Cloud using AWS Bedrock

nodes.name: ChatGPT Code Review GPT Action
nodes.description: CodeLens: Production-grade FastAPI + React GPT Action delivering AI-powered code reviews via GitHub API integration, GPT-4o-mini structured analysis with token-aware chunking, Redis-backed caching, SSE streaming, PostgreSQL persistence, Prometheus observability, and a complete OpenAPI 3.1 schema for ChatGPT GPT Store deployment.

nodes.name: Multi GPU Distributed Training Framework
nodes.description: Production-ready multi-GPU distributed training framework with DDP/FSDP, gradient compression, and 89% scaling efficiency at 16 GPUs. Includes TensorBoard monitoring, auto-checkpointing, and Kubernetes deployment.

nodes.name: Multi Robot Coordination Framework
nodes.description: Multi-Robot Coordination Framework with distributed reinforcement learning achieving 92% convergence, <50ms allocation, and 99.9% availability Scalable autonomous robot fleet coordination using Q-learning, auction algorithms, and fault-tolerant ROS2 architecture supporting 50+ agents

nodes.name: NeMo Speech Alignment and Text Normalization
nodes.description: Production-grade speech data preparation pipeline using NVIDIA NeMo for text normalization (numbers, currency, dates, abbreviations), CTC-based forced alignment with word-level timestamps, and automated quality validation (WER/CER/confidence), featuring an interactive Streamlit demo.

nodes.name: Prediction market calibration analysis
nodes.description: Quantitative calibration analysis of binary event contracts in prediction markets, examining favorite-longshot bias, pricing dynamics, and forecasting accuracy with statistical validation and interactive visualizations.

nodes.name: Real Time Multi Target Detection and Tracking Pipeline
nodes.description: Real-time multi-target detection & tracking in C++17. Python prototype → optimized native implementation. Zero external deps. Includes benchmarks and 17 unit tests.

nodes.name: Risk Analytics Fraud Detection
nodes.description: Built an End to End Data Science project to analyze the risk of Fraud transactions and create a predictive model to prevent it.

nodes.name: Search Relevance and Ranking System
nodes.description: Advanced information retrieval system with machine learning-based ranking (LambdaMART) achieving 91.4% accuracy across 500K+ queries, complete with statistical A/B testing and explainability analysis.

nodes.name: Space Image Detection pipeline
nodes.description: Point-source and streak detection pipeline for space surveillance imagery — C++ (OpenCV) with Python prototypes, sub-pixel centroid refinement, and Hough-based streak clustering

nodes.name: 5g Service and Network Orchestrator
nodes.description: Intelligent 5G network platform deployed on Kubernetes with AI-powered prediction to dynamically optimize network slicing and enhance user Quality of Experience in real-time.

nodes.name: Advertising Campaign Analytics Real Time Bidding Platform
nodes.description: Real-time advertising analytics platform with bidding engine (<100ms), streaming pipelines (Kafka/Spark), data warehouse (Redshift), A/B testing framework (23% lift), and advertiser dashboards processing 1M+ events/sec with 99.95% uptime.
